name: mol-slice-pipeline
description: 8-step pipeline for migrating a single slice: research, plan, test-design, test-implement, test-verify, implement, verify, report.

variables.name: slice_name
variables.description: Name of the slice being processed

variables.name: slice_type
variables.description: Type of slice: vertical or horizontal

variables.name: slice_files
variables.description: Comma-separated list of files in this slice

steps.name: research
steps.title: {{slice_name}}: Research
steps.description_template: Analyze existing code for slice {{slice_name}} ({{slice_type}}). Files: {{slice_files}}. Understand current behavior, edge cases, dependencies. Document findings.

steps.name: plan
steps.title: {{slice_name}}: Plan
steps.description_template: Create implementation plan for {{slice_name}}. Reference research findings. Define approach for porting/building this {{slice_type}} slice. List files to create/modify: {{slice_files}}.

steps.name: test-design
steps.title: {{slice_name}}: Test Design
steps.description_template: Design behavioral test cases for {{slice_name}}. Produce given/when/then YAML. Cover happy paths, edge cases, error states. Slice description: {{slice_description}}. Files: {{slice_files}}.

steps.name: test-implement
steps.title: {{slice_name}}: Test Implement
steps.description_template: Translate test designs into Maestro YAML flows for {{slice_name}}. Write to e2e/flows/{{slice_name}}/. Follow Maestro conventions. Include screenshots at assertion points.

steps.name: test-verify
steps.title: {{slice_name}}: Test Verify
steps.description_template: Run Maestro flows for {{slice_name}} against existing app. Debug failures, retry up to 2 times. Capture video and screenshots to e2e/output/{{slice_name}}/.

steps.name: implement
steps.title: {{slice_name}}: Implement
steps.description_template: Implement {{slice_name}} ({{slice_type}}) in the new app. Files: {{slice_files}}. Follow the plan. Code must pass the test flows from test-implement step.

steps.name: verify
steps.title: {{slice_name}}: Verify
steps.description_template: Run Maestro flows for {{slice_name}} against new app. Compare results with old app. Debug and fix any failures. Ensure parity.

steps.name: report
steps.title: {{slice_name}}: Report
steps.description_template: Generate report for {{slice_name}}. Collect artifacts from test-verify and verify steps. Build report.json. Copy artifacts to reports/{{slice_name}}/.
